summary: AI Stock Analysis Feature for watchlist - provides AI-assisted investment recommendations by integrating market sentiment, company events, news sentiment, and technical analysis with LLM-powered insights
approach: Backend Infrastructure (DB + API + LLM) → Data Collection Service (AkShare extensions) → Analysis Engine → Frontend UI. Sequential dependency: each layer builds on the previous.

design_decisions.decision: Use AkShare for data collection instead of proprietary APIs
design_decisions.rationale: AkShare provides 14+ functions covering sentiment, events, news, and sector data with no additional cost
design_decisions.tradeoff: Limited to Chinese market data; some gaps in individual stock capital flow data

design_decisions.decision: LLM integration via OpenAI-compatible API endpoint
design_decisions.rationale: Flexibility to use any LLM provider (self-hosted or cloud) while maintaining standard interface
design_decisions.tradeoff: Requires external LLM service; latency depends on API provider

design_decisions.decision: Async API endpoints with connection pooling
design_decisions.rationale: Meets 200ms p95 latency requirement; batch analysis can be async with status polling
design_decisions.tradeoff: Increased complexity in error handling for async operations

design_decisions.decision: Weighted scoring: technical(35%) + sentiment(25%) + event(25%) + news(15%)
design_decisions.rationale: Balances quantitative (technical) with qualitative signals; weights configurable
design_decisions.tradeoff: Fixed weights may not suit all investment styles

data_flow.diagram: User Request → API Layer → AnalysisEngine → [TechnicalAnalyzer, SentimentCollector, EventProcessor, NewsImpactAnalyzer] → RecommendationScorer → LLM Enhancement → Database → Response

stages.output: Raw data: technical indicators, sentiment scores, events, news
Component scores: technical_score, sentiment_score, event_score, news_impact

quality_check.notes: All requirements covered across 4 tasks. No circular dependencies. Quantified convergence criteria. Follows architecture constraints (layer separation, stateless services, async/await, Pydantic, SQLAlchemy ORM).
